# @universe-design/stylex: UD Compile-time Atomic CSS in JS Lib

[TOC]

## 🗒 Description

## 🏗 Usage

一般用法

```tsx
import stylex from '@universe-design/stylex'

const cssText = stylex.create({
  fontSize: 14,
  lineHeight: 1.5715,
})

// ↓↓↓↓↓↓↓↓↓↓↓↓↓↓↓↓↓↓↓↓↓↓↓↓↓↓↓↓↓↓↓↓
// import u7t19iy from 'path-to-stylex-runtime/u7t19iy'
// import uuie7ay from 'path-to-stylex-runtime/uuie7ay'
//
// const cssText = {
//   fontSize: u7t19iy,
//   lineHeight: uuie7ay,
// }
//
// ================================

document.body.className = stylex(cssText) // 'u7t19iy uuie7ay'
```

为 preset style 提供 alias className

```tsx
import stylex from '@universe-design/stylex'

const cssText = stylex.create({
  fontSize: 14,
  lineHeight: 1.5715,
})
cssText.alias = 'u-text'

document.body.className = stylex(cssText) // 'u7t19iy uuie7ay u-text'
```

composed preset style

```tsx
import stylex from '@universe-design/stylex'

const cssText = stylex.create({
  fontSize: 14,
  lineHeight: 1.5715,
})

const cssColorPrimary = stylex.create({
  color: 'var(--primary-color)',
})

const cssTextPrimary = stylex.compose(cssText, cssColorPrimary)
cssTextPrimary.alias = 'u-text-primary'

document.body.className = stylex(cssTextPrimary) // 'u7t19iy uuie7ay xxx u-text-primary'
```
